headline: South Florida's Economy Shifting Gears: Hiring Slows, Real Estate Balances, & Big Money Bets Continue

stories.title: Real American Beer Navigates Founder Legacy Challenge
stories.summary: Regional craft beer company grappling w/ how to evolve beyond its iconic founder without losing its loyal fanbase. Classic founder-era biz problem.
stories.takeaway: succession planning lowkey hits different when your brand IS the founder tbh

stories.title: Broward Commits $2M to Sponsor FIFA World Cup 2026
stories.summary: Broward County Commission voted 8-0 to drop up to $2M on sponsoring the World Cup, even though zero games are actually in Broward (they're all in Miami-Dade). Wild move.
stories.takeaway: sometimes you gotta invest in the vibe even if the games aren't technically in your county fr fr

stories.title: Stephen Ross Lands Record $772M Construction Loan for West Palm Beach
stories.summary: Billionaire's Related Corp secured Florida's largest-ever construction loan to build two massive office towers (nearly 1M sq ft) in downtown West Palm. That's literally insane scale.
stories.takeaway: when you're stephen ross, banks literally line up w/ half-billion dollar checks like it's nothing

stories.title: Fort Lauderdale Hotel Expansion & Omni Grand Opening Signal Tourism Recovery
stories.summary: The Omni Fort Lauderdale just opened w/ 800+ rooms, giving the convention corridor a major infrastructure upgrade. Hotels ramping up capacity to catch the visitor surge.
stories.takeaway: tourism's bouncing back & hotels are lowkey racing to expand their game before the rush hits harder

watchNext.title: Miami Freedom Park Getting Its Own Development District
watchNext.why: Major infrastructure project financing its own operations—signs of serious momentum in downtown revitalization. Worth tracking long-term.

watchNext.title: South Florida Small Biz Confidence Rising Despite Hiring Slowdown
watchNext.why: Entrepreneurs are optimistic about 2026 but hesitant to hire—mixed signals matter for the whole regional economy, especially for jobs outlook.
